reviews.title: Interior and amenities
reviews.text: The room is dirty, old, and looks very scary. The TV has no power and can't be turned on, the bed sheets are dirty, and the room smells very musty. The furniture is water-damaged and rotten. At night, someone knocked and tried to unlock the door, but luckily I had a lock on the inside. It's worse than a regular motel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
The room is far away from the elevator. We have to take many turns so we could get to our room.
The bathroom of 2 rooms i booked are bad and 1 AC in the other room is not cool at all.
On check-in day, they reported that 1 room was sold out but I had previously booked 2 rooms.

reviews.title: The hotel is very bad.
reviews.text: The air-conditioned hotel is not cold, the room smells bad. I asked the staff to change rooms, but they refused and wanted to charge extra for the room change. The staff are lazy and do not satisfy the customers. They did not fix the air conditioner and when I asked to change rooms, they did not assist me with moving, making me go up and down the stairs almost 10 times to move. A very bad experience and I will not return to this hotel ever again!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Cheap
reviews.negatives: Old

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng máy lạnh không mát, tivi không hoạt động, nệm cứng như đá, trần nhà trong phòng vệ sinh bị thủng lỗ. Trải nghiệm rất tệ :(…..ảnh trên app khác xa thực tế. Khách sạn cũ nát

reviews.title: It could be a much better place needed tlc
reviews.positives: The price is friendly, clean and ok location
reviews.negatives: The room has a strong smell and think it could be from the old mattress. The entire building requires attention, the sink was loose, crack, the shelf was halfway hanging, the towels were frayed, the top floor needed cleaning corners were packed with mildews

reviews.title: You should not book this hotel.
reviews.text: I booked a room the day before, and I called the manager to confirm - the hotel does not require a deposit. The next day I arrived to check in and the hotel reported that there were no rooms available. Such a way of working deserves a 1-star rating.

reviews.title: OK for location and value
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Air con to lound

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The new room was damp, had a bad smell, and the sheets were also wet. While I was sleeping at night, a centipede crawled up, luckily neither I nor my friend was bitten. At 3 AM, I messaged the staff to come check, but after searching for a while, they didn't find anything and just said to call the cleaning staff in the morning without any apology or room change. We had to wait until 4 AM for the centipede to crawl out and kill it before we dared to lie down in bed. Despite the price of 200k per night, it should ensure cleanliness for guests; what if something happened to us, as there have been many cases like that before? It looks luxurious on the outside but is really terrible inside.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Good

reviews.text: Khách sạn xuống cấp và bẩn, ruồi nhiều, hôi. Ko có khách nên KS ko tu sửa, xuống cấp trầm trọng

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Quite

reviews.title: The facilities are poorly furnished, and the cleanliness is not satisfactory.
reviews.text: At first glance, this hotel looks decent, but upon arrival and entering the room, the experience is truly horrific. The rooms have deteriorated after many years of use, but have not been upgraded. The appliances in the room are mostly not usable, the air conditioning cannot be controlled, the TV cannot be watched, the water pressure is very low and there is no hot water. The toilet lacks space to sit, which the hotel does not acknowledge. The room cleanliness is very poor, with mouse droppings on the bed. One night stay was an awful experience.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Very good value , Wonderful location , Very clean and it was fantastic 

The facilities was wonderful too.

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: The air conditioner is as noisy as a washing machine, the TV can't be turned on, there is no hairdryer, there's no bottled water, and the refrigerator is not usable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
It closed to everything,  the staff 
 were very nice.. Price was reasonable. 
Thank.you.

reviews.title: Scary
reviews.text: I booked through the app and it seemed cheap! Looking for a hotel and crying out loud because there's no bright name sign like in the pictures, it's completely dark, right at a crossroads, and the trees surrounding it look scary like you'd see a ghost! When I checked in, the air conditioner was leaking, the walls looked scary, the shower head was cracked and not working, the toilet... I already paid so I have to tough it out for the night! The staff were okay though, overall, you get what you pay for, but this is definitely not worth it!

reviews.title: Agréable
reviews.positives: Un aspect vintage sympathique, personnel disponibles
reviews.negatives: Ma chambre sentait un peu le renfermé.

reviews.title: It depends on what you desire from the hotel.
reviews.text: "I chose this place because I thought, 'If I can take a shower and sleep well, I'll be satisfied'... but the shower is the typical lukewarm shower in Vietnam, there are several leaks in the room, and the bed is in such a condition that it's damp... The air conditioning doesn't work well, and the WiFi connection is poor... At least the room is spacious for the accommodation cost, which is a small relief."

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Das Gebäude von aussen. Erinnerte mich an Nizza.
Der Fahrstuhl. Gegenüber ist ein Gemüseladen, sonst nichts.
reviews.negatives: Marode Möbel. Am schlimmsten war das Bad. Chronische Überschwemmung. Der Fliesenleger hatte keine Wasserwaage. Und der Klempner keine Rohrzange. Die Klobrille nicht vorhanden. Erst gab man mir ein kleines Zimmer ohne Fenster.  Nach Zahlung von 31K bekam ich dann das Katastrophen Zimmer mit Fenster.

reviews.title: Tired old hotel
reviews.text: Some maintenance issues in bathroom, room locks and tv.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 內部裝潢及地理位置性價比高

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The front desk was unhelpful and unfriendly (lazy). The WiFi was too weak, and when I reported it to the front desk, they were indifferent, treating it as if it wasn't their responsibility and leaving the guests to deal with it. The TV didn't come with a remote control. It was terrible; giving 3 stars is already very generous.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 109호인가를 소개해주었어요. 북킹 예약 안하고 그냥 갔을때 25만동에 하루 묶게 해주셨구요. 2026년2월이에요. 25만동 이하 요금 호텔은 대부분 오래되서 방 구석은 깨끗하지 않아요. 다만 시트나 다른 사용하는 곳은 깨끗했고 수건도 좋았어요. 특히나 저희는 창문이 크고 환기가 잘 되는 곳을 선호하는데 마침 그 방은 환기가 잘 되서 좋았어요. 모기는 없었구요.
reviews.negatives: 가구를 조금만 움직이면 뒷편에 쓰레기가 있어요. 그런 부분을 조금 개선하면 더 멋진 곳이 될듯합니다.

reviews.title: Stay overnight and conveniently eat at delicious restaurants.
reviews.text: Our house is for overnight stays, so it doesn’t require much. The parking is spacious because it's a corner unit, with a large yard, close to the square for the kids to play with electric cars. Within 2 km, there are many delicious and cheap eating options, with a unique and tasty milk tea place across the street that has fresh sugar palm. The room and furnishings are old but relatively clean. The sound insulation is quite good, and it's not noisy despite being surrounded by many birdhouses. Please pay attention to cleaning inside the cupboard.

reviews.text: This accommodation is a bit far from the sea, but there are plenty of food options around and the staff is very friendly. This is my third time staying here, and I leave satisfied every time. I will use it again when I come next.

reviews.negatives: Đổi đến 2 lần cho 2 phòng mà tủ lạnh và máy lạnh rất yếu, phải mua thêm quạt giấy bằng tay để quạt và ngủ. Mặc dù nhân viên rất nhiệt tình để đổi cho phòng khác, mà phòng nào máy lạnh cũng yếu rất nóng vì trong phòng cũng không có quạt máy, cơ sở hạ tầng đã xuống cấp.

- Về chi phí: không biết booking thu phí hay Ks thu phí, nhưng trên booking đã ghi không phát sinh thê chi phí khi đặt phòng, nhưng bên Ks lại thu thêm phí để trả về booking, chi phí đc giải thích không logic.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Nhìn chung, phòng giường đơn cỡ lớn tôi thuê khá phù hợp với giá tiền.
Vị trí thuận tiện di chuyển tham quan nội ô TP. Rạch Giá.
Phòng tắm sạch sẽ, có nước nóng.
Nhân viên lễ tân đều là nam, chưa chuyên nghiệp trong nghiệp vụ khách sạn và tiếp tân nhưng cũng nhiệt tình và thân thiện.
reviews.negatives:
1. Không gian phòng: cửa gỗ đã bị mối khoét lỗ sâu, góc tường bị ố bẩn, đóng mạng nhện, phòng có mùi hôi ẩm.
2. Tiện ích: khăn tắm hơi cũ, không có máy sấy tóc, không có khăn giấy, không có nước lọc hay trà hay cà phê, 1 góc đèn trên trần đã hư

reviews.title: NẾU BẠN CHỈ MUỐN GIÁ TỐT + MỘT CHỖ NGỦ QUA ĐÊM RỒI ĐI TIẾP THÌ OKAY.
reviews.positives: GIÁ PHÒNG HỢP LÝ
reviews.negatives:
CÔ LÀM PHÒNG RẤT SẠCH BÀN/ GHẾ/ TỦ GIƯỜNG ĐỀ SẠCH. Tuy nhiên, HỆ THỐNG THOÁT NƯỚC BỒN CẦU KHÔNG THOÁT TỐT. NƯỚC TẮM YẾU. KHĂN TẮM CŨ. MÁY LẠNH CŨ & YẾU, PHẢI NHỜ QUẠT BÀN HỖ TRỢ MỚI ĐẢM BẢO LẠNH, NHƯNG PHÒNG CỦA EM GÁI THÌ RẤT NÓNG. 

Tuy nhiên, nếu bạn chỉ cần nghỉ qua đêm và đi tiếp với giá tiền hợp lý thì ks cũng là chọn lựa hợp lý.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, nhân viên thân thiện. Vị trí hơi vắng nhưng gần bờ biển nên đi dạo được.
reviews.negatives: Cơ sở vật chất đủ dùng thôi và còn nhiều bất cập như điều hoà phải mất một lúc lâu mới mát. Đèn ánh sáng yếu nên khiến mình nhức mắt. Mình đi công tác nên chỉ cần chỗ nghỉ qua đêm nên prefer giá rẻ.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: lần mình đi gặp 1 nhóm gia đình hơn 16 người rất đông, tối khuya họ ko ngủ mà bày tiệc ra nhậu, quậy ì đùng nhưng chủ ks không có nghe vì do ks rộng lắm, mình nhắn cho chủ ks vì bị làm phiền, sau đó có giải quyết nhưng chưa đầy 30ph sau họ lại làm đùng đùng nữa, cả đêm ko ngủ được. Cách âm của ks không tốt nên nghe rất rõ tiếng bên ngoài, đám người đó ko chỉ chơi đùa trong phòng còn chơi dọc hành lang suốt đêm nên cả nhà mình có trải nghiệm ko tốt lần đó.
